sentence_reviews.text: Knowledge is encoded implicitly in learned parameters and recalled through model computation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA and Deep Learning support learned knowledge representations and parameterized models, but the cited packet does not provide a direct parametric-memory definition.
sentence_reviews.notes: The claim is conceptually defensible, but exact wording should cite a parametric-memory or knowledge-in-parameters source.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Parametric memory is to connect Large-scale pretraining, Transformers to downstream capabilities including Semantic memory, Knowledge editing & memory consolidation.

sentence_reviews.notes: Treat as a graph-positioning claim; dependencies are plausible but the full downstream list needs direct source support.

sentence_reviews.text: Stored or retrieved information can be stale, private, contradictory, inaccessible, or incorrectly ranked at the moment it is needed. Its direct dependencies include Large-scale pretraining, Transformers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The stale/private/contradictory/incorrectly ranked limitation is generally plausible for memory and retrieval systems, but most packets cite only broad background sources.
sentence_reviews.notes: The limitation should be narrowed or backed by a memory/retrieval safety source; dependency list portion is graph-derived.
